from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    ctx = browser.new_context(storage_state='/Users/dhruvatreja/gcp_session.json')
    page = ctx.new_page()
    page.goto('https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/iam?project=gen-lang-client-0741137429', timeout=30000)
    page.wait_for_timeout(8000)
    
    # Click the "Include Google-provided role grants" checkbox to see all members
    checkboxes = page.query_selector_all('input[type="checkbox"]')
    if checkboxes:
        print("Clicking checkbox to include Google-provided role grants...")
        checkboxes[0].click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(4000)
    
    # Get all rows again
    rows = page.query_selector_all('table tr')
    print(f"\nTotal table rows after toggle: {len(rows)}")
    
    members = []
    for i, row in enumerate(rows):
        text = row.inner_text()
        if text.strip() and i > 0:  # skip header
            cells = row.query_selector_all('td')
            if len(cells) >= 4:
                principal = cells[1].inner_text().strip() if len(cells) > 1 else ""
                name = cells[2].inner_text().strip() if len(cells) > 2 else ""
                role = cells[3].inner_text().strip() if len(cells) > 3 else ""
                if principal:
                    members.append({"principal": principal, "name": name, "role": role})
    
    print("\nAll members:")
    for m in members:
        print(f"  Email: {m['principal']}")
        print(f"  Name:  {m['name']}")
        print(f"  Role:  {m['role']}")
        print()
    
    # Take final screenshot
    page.screenshot(path='/tmp/iam_final.png', full_page=True)
    
    browser.close()
EOF
